title: strophanthus arnoldianus
intro: Strophanthus arnoldianus, also known as the Arnold's Strophanthus, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include cardiac glycosides, such as strophanthin, a powerful heart stimulant. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat heart conditions, such as atrial fibrillation, and its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Strophanthus arnoldianus is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, extracts, and infusions, to treat various health issues, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional due to potential toxicity.
